attributes.description: Alerts when average database latency exceeds 5 ms. Redis should be sub-millisecond.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database high latency

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise database high latency

### What fired
Average `bdb_avg_latency` > 5 ms during the window.

### Why it matters
Sustained latency above 5 ms indicates memory pressure, persistence (fork) activity, hot shards, or CPU contention.

### Triage
1. Look at shard CPU and fragmentation.
2. Check persistence jobs and fork durations.

### Remediation
- Rebalance shards across nodes.
- Tune persistence settings.

### Tuning
- 5 ms threshold; tune to SLA.
